item.title: Test Post
item.description:
Hello! Let’s see if this is actually working now! The name’s Roshan; I’m currently a junior at Harvard studying math, and I’ve been curious lately about the creative things I might be able to work on online.

More seriously, the primary goal here is to create a parody website of my roommate’s own site. The first step is to reverse-engineer his setup, which includes Hugo.

I’m also going to try including some $$\LaTeX,$$ such as $$\sum_{x\in X}{f(x)}<3.$$ We can even to inline stuff: \(3\times 3\)

Does \(\text{inline}\) work? It seems to!

We might even be able to include music!

X:1
T:from Rise Up
C:Imagine Dragons
L:1/4
M:4/4
K:Eb
V:1 treble-8 nm="Tenor 1" snm="T1"
V:2 treble-8 nm="Tenor 2" snm="T2"
V:3 bass nm="Baritone" snm="B1"
V:4 bass nm="Bass" snm="B2"
V:1
 z e g f- | f e f a- | a g f e- | e e a g- | g e g f- |
 f e d c- | c4 | z4 | z e g f- | f e f a- |
 a g f e- | e e a g- | g e g f- | f e d c- | c4 |]
V:2
 z c B B- | B B c c- | c c e (d | c2) c d | e f g a- |
 a f (e f) | g4 | z4 | z c B B- | B B c c- |
 c c e (d | c2) c d | e f g a- | a f (e f) | g4 |]
V:3
 z E, F, G, | A, G, A, F, | E,2 F, G,- | G, G,2 C- | C A, C G, |
 C G, F, E,- | E,4 | z4 | z E, F, G, | A, G, A, F, |
 E,2 F, G,- | G, G,2 C- | C A, C G, | C G, F, E,- | E,4 |]
V:4
 z C, C, C, | D, D, D, B,, | E,, E,,2 E,,- | E,, E,, F,, A,,- | A,, A,, B,, F,,- |
 F,, A,, C,2- | C,4 | z4 | z C, C, C, | D, D, D, B,, |
 E,, E,,2 E,,- | E,, E,, F,, A,,- | A,, A,, B,, G,,- | G,, A,, C,2- | C,4 |]

I can even optionally compile the music into MIDIs; I’m currently thinking through how better to play them in the browser or if they are a feature I actually want.

Anyways, this is something I’ll be working on over the next few weeks, so please just allow stuff to be broken for the time being.

Until next time!
